audit_items.proof_trace: The sole kmalloc in nfp_hwinfo.c (hwinfo_try_fetch L181) is either freed on all internal error paths via the exit_free label (kfree(db) at L204) or ownership is cleanly transferred through nfp_hwinfo_read to callers in nfp_main.c. nfp_hwinfo_read additionally calls kfree(db) on validation failure (L241), and all callers in nfp_main.c free the pointer via kfree(pf->hwinfo) in error paths (L786) and shutdown (L825).
